headline: NRG Energy to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 4, 2026
summary: HOUSTON, July 07, 2026--NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NRG) plans to report its second quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, August 4, 2026. Management will present the results during a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. EST (8:00 a.m. CST).
